title: expand_vars always allocates even when variables disabled
description: expand_vars returns String and, when ctx.variables_enabled is false (the common case for scripts without require variables), immediately returns s.to_string() — cloning every operand string. eval_header_test and friends then collect these into Vec<String> (field_names, keys). When variables are not in use, a Cow<str> or &str return would avoid all these allocations — expected impact: eliminate O(fields+keys) String clones per test in the common no-variables case.
